266.reason: [When an unmatchable token is encountered, the lexer breaks out of the loop and stops tokenization, leading to an empty token list. This does not properly handle errors as required by the problem (no error output is produced via errorMap or printed to error.txt). Instead, the program should likely add an error to the errorMap with the appropriate error type and continue, or at least output the error line and code to error.txt as specified.]
